title: Chashbaddanah #2806
definition:
Hashbadana = "considerate judge"

 1) one of the men who stood on the left of Ezra while he read the
    law to the people
nasbUsage:
Definition: Hashbadana = "considerate judge"

 1) one of the men who stood on the left of Ezra while he read the
    law to the people

    NASB:  an Isr.
